title: andropogon ternatus
intro: Andropogon ternatus, also known as 'Kasoori', is a type of grass native to the Indian subcontinent, belonging to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Andropogon ternatus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Andropogon ternatus include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by boiling the leaves and roots in water to extract its medicinal properties.
